_comment: Fleet registry — one entry per deployed site. Source of truth for per-site ISOLATION (each site = its own Worker + its own SESSION KV, nothing shared) and the canary→ring deploy. The SHARED base config (main/assets/compat/observability) is wrangler.jsonc, resolved by @astrojs/cloudflare into dist/server/wrangler.json at build; scripts/gen-wrangler.mjs patches THAT with each site's name/routes/kv (so there is no base duplicated here to drift). Add a site = add an entry (+ create its SESSION KV account-side, put the id below). ring 0 = canary. .github/workflows/deploy-fleet.yml promotes by ring. At ~100-150 sites migrate to Workers for Platforms (see docs/blog-platform/fleet-deploy.md). D1 added per-site only when a feature needs it.
